upgrade_source: MTA press release: Utica Av AC Station Becomes the 82nd Fully ADA Accessible Subway Station; Wikipedia (Utica Avenue station)
notes: Three elevators installed May 2014: one near intersection of Utica Ave and Fulton St (mezzanine to street), two connecting platforms to mezzanine. Became the 82nd fully ADA-accessible subway station and 21st in Brooklyn. Additional work included ADA boarding areas with tactile warning strips, signage, customer assistance intercoms, and reconfigured control area.
